# Gobiya

> Gobiya is a Los Angeles internet marketing consulting firm founded in 2010 by Steve Martin (Gobiya LLC since 2012). We recover organic traffic lost to Google algorithm updates and engineer the technical, content, and authority signals that get brands cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. BBB A+ rated; Google Partner 2015–2019.

Contact: hello@gobiya.com · +1-323-744-1338 · 3580 Wilshire Blvd, Ste 132, Los Angeles, CA 90010

## Services

- [SEO & Discoverability](https://www.gobiya.com/services/seo-discoverability): Technical SEO, crawlability, structured data, Core Web Vitals, algorithm recovery
- [GEO & AI Content Writing](https://www.gobiya.com/services/geo-ai-content-writing): Content engineered to be cited in AI-generated answers
- [Digital PR & Link Building](https://www.gobiya.com/services/authority-link-building): Editorial link acquisition and entity alignment
- [AI Visibility (GEO)](https://www.gobiya.com/ai-visibility): How we get brands cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI Overviews
- [All services](https://www.gobiya.com/services): SEO, copywriting and content strategy, digital PR and link building, Google Ads and AI creative, CRO, web development, AI/LLM consulting

## Guides

- [What Is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?](https://www.gobiya.com/insights/what-is-generative-engine-optimization): Complete guide to how AI engines crawl, extract, and cite content
- [How to Get Cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity & AI Overviews](https://www.gobiya.com/insights/get-cited-by-chatgpt-perplexity-ai-overviews)
- [SEO vs GEO](https://www.gobiya.com/insights/seo-vs-geo): How the two disciplines differ and overlap
- [Why Did My Website Traffic Drop?](https://www.gobiya.com/insights/why-did-my-website-traffic-drop): Diagnosing algorithm updates, penalties, and technical regressions
- [How Much Does SEO Cost?](https://www.gobiya.com/insights/how-much-does-seo-cost)
- [All insights](https://www.gobiya.com/insights)
